title: Indulgent Steamed Ukrainian Pasta
description: A comforting, low-glycemic Ukrainian dish featuring a shaggy, steamed pasta, perfect for a lazy Sunday.

ingredients.name: Buckwheat Egg Noodles
ingredients.notes: preferably homemade or store-bought buckwheat egg noodles

instructions: Combine 4 cups of water and 1 tablespoon of butter in a large pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat and add 8 ounces of buckwheat egg noodles, cover, and steam for 8 minutes.
While the noodles are cooking, sauté diced onion in a small pan with 1 tablespoon of butter until softened.
In a separate bowl, whip heavy cream until it forms stiff peaks, then set aside.
Melt 8 ounces of white cheddar cheese in the microwave, then mix with 8 ounces of mascarpone cheese.
Add the softened onion mixture to the cheese mixture and stir until well combined.
Once the noodles are cooked, remove from heat and let cool for 1 minute.
Add the whipped cream on top of the noodles, followed by the cheese and onion mixture.
Sprinkle with furikake if desired, and season with salt to taste.
